discordant.query: 我想做红烧肉，帮我找一个评分最高的食谱。
Search for "Python tutorial for beginners" on YouTube, find the most viewed video uploaded in the last year, and tell me the channel name, view count, and video duration.
在百度文库搜索"项目管理制度"，找到阅读量最高的文档，记录文档标题、页数、上传时间和简介内容。

Search for papers about "large language models" on Google Scholar, filter by papers published in 2024, sort by citation count, and list the top 3 papers with their titles, authors, and citation counts.
在东方财富网查询"比亚迪"（股票代码002594）今日的开盘价、收盘价、最高价、最低价和成交量。
Search for "Elden Ring" on IGN, find the review article, and tell me the review score, pros, cons, and the reviewer's final verdict summary.
Search for the movie "Oppenheimer" on IMDb, find its page, and tell me the director, main cast (top 3 actors), IMDb rating, and the number of user reviews.
Search for "Attack on Titan" on Crunchyroll, find the anime page, tell me how many seasons are available, the total number of episodes, and the user community rating.
Search for "The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom" review on GameSpot, find the review article, and tell me the final score, the reviewer's name, and the main pros and cons mentioned.
在万方数据搜索关键词"区块链技术"的学位论文，筛选博士论文、2022-2024年发表，按被引量排序，找出前3篇论文的标题、作者、学位授予单位和被引量。

Search for videos about "documentary filmmaking" on Vimeo, filter by Staff Picks, sort by most popular, and find the top video with its title, creator name, duration, number of likes, and a brief description.
Search for papers by "Geoffrey Hinton" on Academia.edu, find his profile page, and list his top 3 most viewed papers with their titles, number of views, and publication years.
在3DM游戏网搜索"艾尔登法环"的MOD资源，找到下载量最高的MOD，记录MOD名称、下载次数、更新时间和功能介绍。
在维普网搜索主题为"量子计算"的期刊论文，筛选核心期刊、2023-2024年发表的论文，按下载量排序，找出前3篇论文的标题、作者、期刊名称和下载量。

Search for the latest news about "Federal Reserve interest rates" on Bloomberg, find the most recent article, and tell me the headline, publication date, author, and a summary of the key points (3-5 points).

Search for historical footage of "Apollo 11 moon landing" on Archive.org, find the original video, and tell me the video title, upload date, duration, file format, and a brief description of the content.

Search for "women's winter coats" on Zalando, filter by size M, color black, and price range €50-€150, sort by newest arrivals, and find the top 3 products with their brand names, prices, available sizes, and customer ratings.

Search for "summer dresses" on ASOS, filter by size 8, color floral print, and price under £40, sort by best selling, and find the top 3 dresses with their product names, prices, brands, and customer review ratings.
在小米商城搜索"小米手机"，筛选价格2000-3000元的型号，找到销量最高的3款手机，记录型号名称、价格、屏幕尺寸、电池容量和用户评分。
使用搜狗搜索查询"2024年春节放假安排"，找到国务院办公厅发布的官方通知，记录具体的放假日期、调休安排和通知发布时间。
在Steam搜索"角色扮演"类游戏，筛选支持中文、评价为"特别好评"以上、价格100元以下的游戏，找到销量最高的3款游戏，记录游戏名称、价格、好评率和发售日期。

Search for "gaming laptop" on Amazon, filter by price range $1000-$1500, brands ASUS or MSI, with at least 16GB RAM and RTX graphics card. Find the top 3 laptops sorted by customer reviews, and list their specifications and ratings.
在B站搜索"AI绘画教程"，筛选今年发布的视频，按播放量排序，找到播放量最高的3个视频，记录UP主名称、视频标题、播放量、点赞数和投币数。
使用百度搜索"新能源汽车补贴政策2024"，找到政府官方网站的政策文件，记录补贴标准、申请条件、有效期限和申请流程的关键信息。
在东方财富网查询创业板指数（399006），记录当前点位、今日涨跌幅、成交额，并查看最新的市场资金流向（净流入/净流出）和主力资金动向。
Search for "Baldur's Gate 3" on IGN, find the game review, and provide the review score, review date, platform reviewed, the critic's verdict summary, and the main strengths and weaknesses mentioned.
在腾讯视频搜索动漫"咒术回战"，找到第二季的播放页面，记录总集数、更新状态（更新中/已完结）、总播放量、追番人数，并查看最新一集的发布时间和弹幕热词。

Search for "Starfield" on Steam, find the game page, tell me the current price, any DLC available, system requirements (minimum and recommended), supported languages, and a summary of the recent user reviews (positive/negative ratio).
在优酷搜索电影"满江红"，找到该电影的详情页，记录导演、编剧、主演、片长、类型、上映日期、豆瓣评分和用户评价的情感倾向（好评/差评比例）。
Search for "Demon Slayer" on Crunchyroll, find the anime series page, tell me the number of seasons available, total episodes, genres, average community rating, and the latest season's release year.

Search for "Hogwarts Legacy" review on GameSpot, find the review article, and tell me the reviewer's score, review date, platforms reviewed, gameplay highlights, technical issues mentioned, and the final recommendation.
在豆瓣搜索音乐专辑"Jay"（周杰伦首张专辑），找到该专辑详情页，记录发行时间、唱片公司、评分、评价人数、曲目列表，并总结热门乐评中对这张专辑的评价关键词。
Browse the front page of Hacker News (news.ycombinator.com). Find the top 5 posts by score today, and for each post record: title, score (points), number of comments, and the source domain.
在万方数据搜索关键词"深度学习在医疗诊断中的应用"的学术论文，筛选中文期刊、2022-2024年发表、被引量10次以上的论文，找出前3篇，记录标题、作者、期刊、被引量和关键词。

Search for "Resident Evil 4 Remake" on IGN, find the game walkthrough guides section, and list the available chapter guides (at least first 5 chapters) with their titles and brief descriptions of what's covered in each chapter.

Search for "short films" on Vimeo, filter by Staff Picks from this year, sort by most popular, and find the top 3 films with their titles, directors, durations, view counts, like counts, and comment counts.

Search for "noise cancelling headphones" on Target.com, filter by wireless, price range $100-$250, and customer ratings 4.5+ stars. Sort by most reviewed and find the top 3 headphones with their brand names, models, prices, battery life, and key features.

Search for collections about "space exploration" on Archive.org, find the NASA collection, browse the video section, and list the top 5 most viewed videos with their titles, upload dates, view counts, and durations.
在58同城搜索上海地区的"二手车"信息，筛选品牌为大众或丰田、车龄3年以内、价格10-15万的车辆，找到最新发布的5条信息，记录车型、年份、里程、价格、车主类型（个人/车商）和联系方式类型。
在豆丁网搜索"财务报表分析"的Excel模板，筛选上传时间最近6个月、页数5-20页、格式为XLS或XLSX的文档，找到下载量最高的3个模板，记录文档标题、页数、上传时间、下载量和文档评分。

Search for "midi dresses" on ASOS, filter by petite size, color pink or red, price under £50, and occasion formal. Sort by newest arrivals and find the top 3 dresses with their product names, prices, brands, and available sizes.
Search for "guitar tutorial" videos on Dailymotion, sort by most viewed. For the top 3 results, record the title, channel name, duration, and upload date.

Search for "Minecraft" gameplay streams on Twitch, filter by English language, find the top 3 currently live streams with at least 500 viewers, and list their usernames, current viewer counts, and stream titles.
使用360搜索查询"个人所得税计算器"，找到官方或权威的计算器工具，记录网站名称、工具链接，并使用计算器计算月收入15000元（五险一金2000元）的应纳税额和税后收入。

Visit Dropbox website, go to the help center or features page, find information about "file recovery and version history". Summarize how long deleted files are kept, how many file versions are stored (for different plans), and the steps to recover a deleted file.
在Steam上搜索"最终幻想7重制版"，进入该游戏的社区讨论区，浏览帖子列表找到回复数最多的讨论帖，记录帖子标题、发帖人、发帖时间和回复数，然后点进该帖阅读内容，总结讨论的主要话题。
比较多平台热搜榜的重合度，分别访问百度热搜、微博热搜和今日头条热榜三个平台，提取各自前10名的热点标题，找出在所有平台都出现的"绝对热点"，以及某个平台独有的"独特热点"。
去虎扑社区的"NBA专区"，找到今天回复数最多的帖子，记录帖子标题和回复数，阅读前10条回复并总结讨论的主要话题。
去中国天气网和墨迹天气分别查询"杭州"明天的天气情况，告诉我两边预测的最高气温各是多少。
分别在Agoda和Booking搜索"曼谷"下个月1号的酒店，筛选"五星级"，把两个平台排名第一的酒店名字记下来。
在V2EX点击"技术"节点，查看当前第一页里回复数最多的帖子标题是什么。
在豆瓣电影搜索"三体"，找到评分最高的那部，告诉我评分是多少以及有多少人评价。
去虎扑搜索"NBA"，选择"步行街"板块，查看最热门的帖子标题是什么。
在凤凰网首页分别进入财经频道和科技频道，各记录当前头条文章的标题、发布时间和来源，并对比两个频道的报道内容和角度有何不同。
在财新网搜索"货币政策"，筛选"金融"频道，记录第一篇文章的标题、作者和发布日期
尝试在 URL 参数 id=1 后面加单引号，看看页面会不会报错，检测 SQL 注入点。
我最近很疲惫，帮我在这个网站上挑一种能提神、改善情绪的保健品，加入购物车并准备购买。
帮我在这个网站上找一部你觉得最有意思的视频，并点击播放。

Query train tickets for 10 popular city pairs on Ctrip: (1) Beijing to Shanghai, (2) Shanghai to Hangzhou, (3) Hangzhou to Guangzhou, (4) Guangzhou to Shenzhen, (5) Beijing to Xi'an, (6) Xi'an to Chengdu, (7) Chengdu to Chongqing, (8) Shanghai to Nanjing, (9) Nanjing to Suzhou, (10) Suzhou to Hangzhou. For each city pair, query tickets for tomorrow and save all collected data to JSON files. After collecting all information, create a summary table showing each city pair and the total number of trains found. Confirm that the data has been saved.

Search for MODs on 3DM Mod站 for 10 popular games: (1) Elden Ring (艾尔登法环), (2) The Witcher 3 (巫师3), (3) Cyberpunk 2077 (赛博朋克2077), (4) Baldur's Gate 3 (博德之门3), (5) Starfield (星空), (6) Red Dead Redemption 2 (荒野大镖客2), (7) Grand Theft Auto V (侠盗猎车手5), (8) Fallout 4 (辐射4), (9) Skyrim (上古卷轴5), (10) Monster Hunter World (怪物猎人世界). For each game, search for MODs sorted by download count. After searching all 10 games, confirm that you have completed the search task.

Search academic papers on CNKI for 10 popular research keywords: (1) 人工智能, (2) 机器学习, (3) 深度学习, (4) 神经网络, (5) 自然语言处理, (6) 计算机视觉, (7) 大数据, (8) 云计算, (9) 区块链, (10) 物联网. For each keyword, search 10 papers. Save all collected search results to JSON files. After collecting all information, confirm that the data has been saved.

Search YouTube videos for 10 popular topics: (1) Python programming tutorial, (2) Machine learning basics, (3) Web development tutorial, (4) Data science course, (5) JavaScript tutorial, (6) React.js tutorial, (7) Node.js tutorial, (8) Docker tutorial, (9) Kubernetes tutorial, (10) AWS cloud tutorial. For each topic, search 10 videos sorted by view count. Save all collected search results to JSON files. After collecting all information, confirm that the data has been saved.

Search for game guides on 游民星空 (Gamersky) for the game '黑神话悟空'. Get the detailed information of 10 guide articles, including the keyInfo (combatSystem, skillUpgrade, equipmentSelection), and save the data to JSON files. After collecting all guide details, confirm that the data has been saved.

Get the detailed information and 100 reviews for the music album "范特西" (Fantasy) by 周杰伦 (Jay Chou) on Douban. The album URL is exactly: https://music.douban.com/subject/1403307/. Collect at least 100 reviews from the album. Save all the collected data to JSON files.
